nodes.doc: Per-call token override for the index scan of exactly **one** source.

nodes.name: SourceIndexFailure
nodes.doc: A source that failed to enumerate during

nodes.name: RepoAccessError
nodes.doc: Distinct failure modes for repo access validation. The editor-api

nodes.name: RepoInfo
nodes.doc: Information we glean from a successful validation call. The

nodes.name: RepoResponse
nodes.doc: Minimal subset of the `/repos/{owner}/{repo}` response we care

nodes.name: CollectedOutput
nodes.doc: A collected output with the parameters required by its article's execution block.

nodes.name: ConflictResolution
nodes.doc: Record of a conflict that was resolved by priority.

nodes.name: LawImplements
nodes.doc: One `machine_readable.implements` entry — the IoC link from a lower

nodes.name: LawOutput
nodes.doc: An output entry from `execution.output`.

nodes.name: LawParam
nodes.doc: A parameter entry from `execution.parameters`.

nodes.name: LoadedLaw
nodes.doc: A loaded law with its source provenance.

nodes.name: SourceMap
nodes.doc: Aggregates laws from multiple sources with priority-based conflict resolution.

nodes.name: Recorder
nodes.doc: Collects the phase durations recorded during a single request.

nodes.name: ScopeWarning
nodes.doc: A validation warning for a law outside its source's scope.

nodes.name: HintWire
nodes.doc: Wire format of a `regelrecht:hint` as it appears in YAML/JSON.

nodes.name: MatchResult
nodes.doc: The outcome of resolving a [`TextQuoteSelector`].

nodes.name: MatchStatus
nodes.doc: Whether a selector could be located, and how unambiguously.

nodes.name: SelectorHint
nodes.doc: Performance hint: where to look first.

nodes.name: TextMatch
nodes.doc: A single located span in the law text.

nodes.name: TextQuoteSelector
nodes.doc: A W3C Web Annotation `TextQuoteSelector`.

nodes.name: LawLoad
nodes.doc: Engine-side loading of an [`ArticleBasedLaw`] from YAML, with the security

nodes.name: RuleContext
nodes.doc: Execution context for article evaluation.

nodes.name: DataSource
nodes.doc: Trait for data source implementations.

nodes.name: DataSourceMatch
nodes.doc: Result of a successful data source query.

nodes.name: DataSourceRegistry
nodes.doc: Registry for data sources with priority-based resolution.

nodes.name: DictDataSource
nodes.doc: Dictionary-based data source with key-based lookup.

nodes.name: ArticleEngine
nodes.doc: Executes a single article's machine_readable.execution section.

nodes.name: ArticleResult
nodes.doc: Result of article execution

nodes.name: OutputProvenance
nodes.doc: Provenance of an output value: how it was produced during execution.

nodes.name: EngineError
nodes.doc: Main error type for engine operations

nodes.name: ExternalError
nodes.doc: External-safe error type that sanitizes internal details.

nodes.name: RoundMode
nodes.doc: Rounding direction.

nodes.name: ValueResolver
nodes.doc: Trait for resolving variable references ($var) during operation execution.

nodes.name: Candidate
nodes.doc: A candidate implementation with its source law and article number.

nodes.name: AcceptedValue
nodes.doc: A value accepted from another organisation's engine (RFC-009).

nodes.name: EngineConfig
nodes.doc: Engine startup configuration that affects execution behavior.

nodes.name: EngineIdentity
nodes.doc: Engine identity for multi-org execution (RFC-009).

nodes.name: ExecutionReceipt
nodes.doc: Top-level execution receipt (RFC-013).

nodes.name: LoadedRegulation
nodes.doc: A regulation that was loaded during execution.

nodes.name: ReceiptExecution
nodes.doc: Execution parameters and context.

nodes.name: ReceiptProvenance
nodes.doc: Which engine and regulation produced the result.

nodes.name: ReceiptResults
nodes.doc: Execution outputs and optional trace.

nodes.name: ReceiptScope
nodes.doc: Which regulations were loaded during execution.

nodes.name: ReceiptSource
nodes.doc: A corpus source that was loaded.

nodes.name: ScopeEntry
nodes.doc: An active jurisdiction scope.

nodes.name: HookEntry
nodes.doc: A hook index entry linking a hook declaration to the law and article that defined it.

nodes.name: LawArticleRef
nodes.doc: A reference to a law article, used in implements and overrides indexes.

nodes.name: RuleResolver
nodes.doc: Resolves cross-law references and provides law registry functionality.

nodes.name: SelectionReason
nodes.doc: Why a law version could not be selected for a reference date.

nodes.name: CacheEntry
nodes.doc: Context for tracking cross-law resolution state.

nodes.name: ExecutionOutcome
nodes.doc: Outcome of a stage-aware execution step.

nodes.name: LawExecutionService
nodes.doc: High-level service for executing laws with automatic cross-law resolution.

nodes.name: LawInfo
nodes.doc: Metadata about a loaded law.

nodes.name: ResolutionContext
nodes.doc: Uses a scoped push/pop pattern for the visited set to avoid

nodes.name: ServiceProvider
nodes.doc: Trait for resolving cross-law references.

nodes.name: StageState
nodes.doc: State of a decision progressing through an AWB-defined procedure lifecycle (RFC-008).

nodes.name: TraceGuard
nodes.doc: RAII guard that pops a trace node when dropped.

nodes.name: OtelGuard
nodes.doc: Guard that shuts down the OTel provider on drop.

nodes.name: BuildingNode
nodes.doc: A node being built, with timing information.

nodes.name: PathNode
nodes.doc: A node in the execution trace tree.

nodes.name: ScopeColumn
nodes.doc: One indentation column in the box-drawing trace (4 chars wide).

nodes.name: TraceBuilder
nodes.doc: Builder for constructing execution traces using a stack-based approach.

nodes.name: Connectivity
nodes.doc: Engine connectivity mode — whether this engine resolves cross-law references.

nodes.name: LegalStatus
nodes.doc: Legal status of execution results.

nodes.name: PathNodeType
nodes.doc: Node type in execution trace

nodes.name: ResolveType
nodes.doc: Resolve type for variable resolution

nodes.name: UntranslatableMode
nodes.doc: How the engine handles articles with `untranslatables` annotations (RFC-012).

nodes.name: AlgebraOp
nodes.doc: The class of operation, for unit-algebra purposes.

nodes.name: Dimension
nodes.doc: The dimension a unit belongs to. Two units are dimension-compatible for

nodes.name: SymbolUnits
nodes.doc: Per-article table mapping symbol name → declared unit.

nodes.name: Unit
nodes.doc: A unit of measurement. `Unknown` means "no declared unit" and never errors.

nodes.name: UnitFinding
nodes.doc: A finding from static unit-checking.

nodes.name: ReferenceType
nodes.doc: Reference type indicating where the reference points

nodes.name: RegelrechtUri
nodes.doc: Parsed regelrecht:// URI or reference

nodes.name: RegelrechtUriBuilder
nodes.doc: Builder for constructing regelrecht:// URIs in a type-safe way

nodes.name: WasmEngine
nodes.doc: WASM-compatible law execution engine with cross-law resolution.

nodes.name: WasmExecuteResult
nodes.doc: Serializable result for execute()

nodes.name: WasmExecuteResultWithTrace
nodes.doc: Serializable result for executeWithTrace()

nodes.name: WasmLawInfo
nodes.doc: Serializable law info for get_law_info()
